scripts.clean: rm -rf services/dashboard/.next node_modules/.cache .turbo services/*/.turbo && (echo 'FLUSHDB' | nc -w2 localhost 6379 || true) && pnpm --filter @flight-hunter/shared build
scripts.kill: pkill -9 -f 'flight-hunter.*chrome-headless-shell' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'flight-hunter.*tsx.*watch' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'flight-hunter.*tsc.*watch' 2>/dev/null; echo 'Killed flight-hunter zombie processes'
scripts.dev: pnpm kill; pnpm clean && turbo dev
